mapper.select: /* kr.dku.univ.mcqi.tcqi.repository.TcqiMapper.preCheck */ SELECT ORGZ_NM ,ORGZ_ANM ,ORGZ_UNT_CD ,DEPT_LOCT_CD FROM UNIV.VW_LSSN_ORGZ_DET WHERE ORGID = #{orgid}

/* kr.dku.univ.mcqi.tcqi.repository.TcqiMapper.findMcqiContInpCnt */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM UNIV.MCQI_CONT_DSC WHERE YY = #{yy} AND ORGID = #{orgid} AND (CONT1 IS NULL OR CONT2 IS NULL OR CONT3 IS NULL OR CONT4 IS NULL OR CONT5 IS NULL OR CONT6 IS NULL OR CONT7 IS NULL OR CONT8 IS NULL)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO UNIV.MCQI_SECT_DSC ( YY, ORGID, PFLT_ID, CQI_DIV_CD, CQI_SECT_CD, CQI_TYPE_CD, CHOI_CD, ANS_TYPE_CD, CONT, SORT_ORD, INPUT_UID, INPUT_DM, INPUT_IP ) VALUES ( #{yy}, #{orgid}, #{pfltId}, #{cqiDivCd}, #{cqiSectCd}, #{cqiTypeCd}, #{choiCd}, #{ansTypeCd}, #{cont}, #{sortOrd}, #{inputUserId}, SYSDATE, #{remoteAddr} )
mapper.select: SELECT M.ORGID, M.PFLT_ID, S.CQI_SECT_CD, S.CQI_TYPE_CD, S.CHOI_CD, COUNT(*) CNT FROM UNIV.MCQI_MASTER M JOIN UNIV.MCQI_SECT_DSC S ON M.YY = S.YY AND M.ORGID = S.ORGID AND M.PFLT_ID = S.PFLT_ID AND M.CQI_DIV_CD = S.CQI_DIV_CD WHERE M.YY = #{yy} AND S.ANS_TYPE_CD = 'OBJ' GROUP BY M.ORGID, M.PFLT_ID, S.CQI_SECT_CD, S.CQI_TYPE_CD, S.CHOI_CD ORDER BY M.ORGID, M.PFLT_ID, S.CQI_SECT_CD, S.CQI_TYPE_CD

/* kr.dku.univ.mcqi.tcqi.repository.TcqiMapper.findLcqiMaster */ SELECT YY ,ORGID ,PFLT_ID ,CQI_DIV_CD ,NVL(SUBMIT_YN, 'N') AS SUBMIT_YN ,SUBMIT_UID ,TO_CHAR(SUBMIT_DM, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS SUBMIT_DM ,NVL(CLOSE_YN, 'N') AS CLOSE_YN ,CLOSE_UID ,TO_CHAR(CLOSE_DM, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS CLOSE_DM ,INPUT_UID ,TO_CHAR(INPUT_DM, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS INPUT_DM ,LTST_UPD_UID ,TO_CHAR(LTST_UPD_DM, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS LTST_UPD_DM FROM UNIV.MCQI_MASTER WHERE YY = #{yy} AND ORGID = #{orgid} AND PFLT_ID = #{pfltId} AND CQI_DIV_CD = '0002'

/* kr.dku.univ.mcqi.tcqi.repository.TcqiMapper.findLcqiPrevSectList */ SELECT CQI_SECT_CD ,CQI_TYPE_CD ,CHOI_CD ,ANS_TYPE_CD ,CONT ,SORT_ORD FROM UNIV.MCQI_SECT_DSC WHERE YY = TO_CHAR(TO_NUMBER(#{yy}) - 1) AND ORGID = #{orgid} AND PFLT_ID = #{pfltId} AND CQI_DIV_CD = '0002' AND CQI_TYPE_CD = '03' /* 이번년도개선계획 → 다음연도 전년도개선계획으로 이월 */ ORDER BY CQI_SECT_CD, SORT_ORD, CHOI_CD

/* kr.dku.univ.mcqi.tcqi.repository.TcqiMapper.findMcqiMasterMap */ SELECT YY, ORGID, PFLT_ID, CQI_DIV_CD , NVL(SUBMIT_YN, 'N') AS SUBMIT_YN , SUBMIT_UID, TO_CHAR(SUBMIT_DM, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS SUBMIT_DM , NVL(CLOSE_YN, 'N') AS CLOSE_YN , CLOSE_UID, TO_CHAR(CLOSE_DM, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS CLOSE_DM , INPUT_UID, TO_CHAR(INPUT_DM, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS INPUT_DM , LTST_UPD_UID, TO_CHAR(LTST_UPD_DM, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS LTST_UPD_DM FROM UNIV.MCQI_MASTER WHERE YY = #{yy} AND ORGID = #{orgid} AND PFLT_ID = #{pfltId} AND CQI_DIV_CD = '0001'

/* kr.dku.univ.mcqi.tcqi.repository.TcqiMapper.findMcqiSectListAll */ SELECT CQI_SECT_CD, CQI_TYPE_CD, CHOI_CD, ANS_TYPE_CD, CONT, SORT_ORD FROM UNIV.MCQI_SECT_DSC WHERE YY = #{yy} AND ORGID = #{orgid} AND PFLT_ID = #{pfltId} AND CQI_DIV_CD = '0001' ORDER BY CQI_SECT_CD, CQI_TYPE_CD, SORT_ORD, CHOI_CD
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM UNIV.MCQI_SECT_DSC WHERE YY = #{yy} AND ORGID = #{orgid} AND PFLT_ID = #{pfltId} AND CQI_DIV_CD = '0001' AND CQI_SECT_CD = #{cqiSectCd} AND CQI_TYPE_CD = #{cqiTypeCd} AND CQI_TYPE_CD != '0001'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO UNIV.MCQI_SECT_DSC (YY, ORGID, PFLT_ID, CQI_DIV_CD, CQI_SECT_CD, CQI_TYPE_CD, CHOI_CD, ANS_TYPE_CD, CONT, SORT_ORD, INPUT_UID, INPUT_DM, INPUT_IP) VALUES (#{yy}, #{orgid}, #{pfltId}, '0001', #{cqiSectCd}, #{cqiTypeCd}, #{choiCd}, #{ansTypeCd}, #{cont}, #{sortOrd}, #{inputUserId}, SYSDATE, #{remoteAddr})
